content:
@flint v0 hybrid
G: keep_401_boundary
C: comparator("<") ∧ grace_30s ∧ literal("401")
P: strict_less_than ∧ rejects_exact_threshold ∧ preserves_keep_401
V: edge_minus_30s_200 ∧ edge_minus_31s_401 ∧ exact_threshold_401 ∧ missing_token_401
A: encode_grace_window ∧ single_comparison_site ∧ ms_normalized ∧ no_skew_widening

[AUDIT]
Goal: keep_401_boundary.
Constraints: comparator("<") and grace_30s and literal("401").
Plan: strict_less_than and rejects_exact_threshold and preserves_keep_401.
Verify: edge_minus_30s_200 and edge_minus_31s_401 and exact_threshold_401 and missing_token_401.
Answer target: encode_grace_window and single_comparison_site and ms_normalized and no_skew_widening.

G: jwt_expiry_grace_boundary_regression
C: normalize_ms ∧ grace_window=30s ∧ compare:`<`_vs_`<=` ∧ `401`_on_expired ∧ no_widen_beyond_skew_budget ∧ deterministic_at_exact_threshold
P: bug=`<=`_admits_exact_expiry ∧ fix=`<` ∧ reject_when(now-exp>grace) ∧ keep_`401` ∧ single_compare_site ∧ minimal_diff in `auth/`
V: edge(-30s)→200 ∧ edge(-31s)→`401` ∧ edge(0s_exact_exp)→`401` ∧ missing_token→`401` ∧ malformed_payload→`401` ∧ unit_mismatch_guard
A: risk=skew_budget_drift ∧ risk=scattered_comparisons_elsewhere ∧ verify=grep_expiry_compares ∧ verify=gateway_clock_drift_assumption

@flint v0 hybrid
G: choose_arch
C: team("6") ∧ deadline("4 months") ∧ db("PostgreSQL") ∧ low_ops ∧ fast_ship
P: modular_monolith ∧ clean_seams ∧ stable_apis ∧ no_shared_mutable
V: boundary_tests ∧ module_contracts ∧ db_isolation_check ∧ release_metrics
A: pick(modular_monolith) ∧ defer_split ∧ split(post_release) ∧ risk(domain_creep)

[AUDIT]
Goal: choose_arch.
Constraints: team("6") and deadline("4 months") and db("PostgreSQL") and low ops and fast shipping.
Plan: modular_monolith and clean_seams and stable_apis and no_shared_mutable.
Verify: boundary_tests and module_contracts and db_isolation_check and release_metrics.
Answer target: pick(modular_monolith) and defer_split and split(post_release) and risk(domain_creep).

G: decide(modular_monolith) ∧ defer(split)
C: team=6 ∧ deadline=4 months ∧ SoR=PostgreSQL ∧ low_ops ∧ fast_ship ∧ split(post_release)_ok
P: distributed_overhead > value@(6,4 months) ∧ clean_module_seams ⇒ split_readiness ∧ PostgreSQL=default_SoR
V: boundaries{auth/,gateway/,billing/,core_app/}=clean ∧ no_shared_mutable_state ∧ stable_module_APIs ∧ release_cadence=weekly_ok
A: ship(modular_monolith/PostgreSQL) ∧ enforce(module_seams) ∧ revisit(split) post_release if scaling/release_boundary pressure

@flint v0 hybrid
G: decide(arch("modular_monolith"))
C: team("6") ∧ deadline("4 months") ∧ store("PostgreSQL") ∧ low_ops ∧ fast_ship
P: split_readiness ⇒ clean_module_seams ∧ stable_apis ∧ no_shared_mutable_state
V: release_cadence_weekly ∧ domain_boundaries{auth ∧ gateway ∧ billing ∧ core_app} ∧ split(post_release) ∧ deferred
A: ship(modular_monolith) ∧ enforce(seams) ∧ defer(decomposition) ∧ revisit_if(scale_or_release_boundary)

[AUDIT]
Goal: decide(arch("modular_monolith")).
Constraints: team("6") and deadline("4 months") and store("PostgreSQL") and low ops and fast shipping.
Plan: split_readiness implies clean_module_seams and stable_apis and no_shared_mutable_state.
Verify: release_cadence_weekly and domain_boundaries{auth and gateway and billing and core_app} and split(post_release) and deferred.
Answer target: ship(modular_monolith) and enforce(seams) and defer(decomposition) and revisit_if(scale_or_release_boundary).

@flint v0 hybrid
G: trust_boundary_fix
C: "x-user-id"_untrusted ∧ session_authoritative ∧ public_edge
P: header_overrides_session ∧ impersonation ∧ horizontal_priv_esc
V: drop_hdr ∧ keep_"401" ∧ spoof_denied ∧ missing_session_"401" ∧ cross_user_denied
A: strip_at_gateway ∧ bind_session.userId ∧ reject_client_"x-user-id" ∧ next(err)_single_site

G: review_header_auth_risk
C: "x-user-id"_at_public_boundary ∧ session.userId_authoritative ∧ minimal_diff
P: client_sends_"x-user-id" ∧ loadUser_trusts_header ∧ impersonation ∧ horizontal_privilege_escalation
V: drop_"x-user-id"_at_gateway/ ∧ bind_scope_from_session.userId ∧ missing_session→"401" ∧ keep_next(err)_site
A: mitigation=strip_header+session_only_lookup ∧ tests=[spoofed_"x-user-id"_denied,missing_session→"401",cross_user_fetch_denied] ∧ risk=trusted_proxy_contract_unverified

@flint v0 hybrid
G: async_await_refactor
C: "async" ∧ "await" ∧ "next(err)" ∧ minimal_diff ∧ same_order
P: preserve_order ∧ single_error_site ∧ keep_signature ∧ no_new_header_trust
V: success_path ∧ validation_fail ∧ downstream_error ∧ no_double_next ∧ this_binding_check
A: wrap_callback ∧ await_inline ∧ route_via_next_err ∧ regression_tests ∧ flag_this_risk

[AUDIT]
Goal: async_await_refactor.
Constraints: "async" and "await" and "next(err)" and minimal_diff and same validation order.
Plan: preserve_order and single_error_site and keep_signature and no_new_header_trust.
Verify: success_path and validation_fail and downstream_error and no_double_next and this_binding_check.
Answer target: wrap_callback and await_inline and route_via_next_err and regression_tests and flag_this_risk.

@flint v0 hybrid
G: refactor_callbacks_to_async_await
C: legacy_callback_flow ∧ next(err)_single_error_path ∧ order=validate→load→branch_not_found→side_effects→respond
P: wrap_callback_in_Promise ∧ use_async/await ∧ preserve_next(err) ∧ minimal_diff ∧ keep_signature ∧ flag_this_binding_risk
V: test_success_path ∧ test_early_validation_fail ∧ test_not_found_branch ∧ test_downstream_error→next(err) ∧ test_no_duplicate_callback ∧ test_audit.log+cache.set_order
A: risk=this_binding_loss ∧ risk=double_next(err) ∧ risk=reordered_side_effects ∧ out_of_scope=signature_change

@flint v0 hybrid
G: refactor_to_async_await
C: legacy_callback ∧ next(err)_single_error_path ∧ order[validate→load→branch_not_found→side_effects→respond] ∧ this_binding_risk
P: minimal_diff ∧ preserve_execution_order ∧ keep_next(err) ∧ no_signature_change ∧ async/await_only_where_safe
V: success_path ∧ early_validation_failure ∧ not_found_branch ∧ downstream_error→next(err) ∧ no_duplicate_callback ∧ audit.log+cache.set_order_preserved
A: wrap_callback(db.findUser)→await ∧ try/catch→next(err) ∧ retain_literals["async","await","next(err)"] ∧ risk:this_binding|non_Promise_semantics
